blended.narrative: Gunstock Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,149 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
